name: Agriculture & Agribusiness
description: The AgriRise Program supports entrepreneurs operating within the agriculture, farming, forestry, fisheries and agribusiness sectors.

name: Mining
description: The MineForce Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the mining and mineral extraction sectors.

name: Energy & Water
description: The PowerFlow Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the energy, water and utilities sectors.

name: Manufacturing & Engineering
description: The ManuBuild Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the manufacturing and engineering sectors.

name: Chemical Industries
description: The ChemEdge Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the chemical and pharmaceutical sectors.

name: Food & Beverage
description: The FoodChain Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the food production and beverage sectors.

name: Textiles / Fibre Processing
description: The Fabric & Fibre Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the textiles, clothing, furniture and printing sectors.

name: Construction
description: The ConstructPro Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the construction and property sectors.

name: Banking & Microfinance
description: The FinBridge Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the banking and microfinance sectors.

name: Accounting & Financial Services
description: The AccuGrowth Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the accounting and financial services sectors.

name: Insurance
description: The InsurePro Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the insurance and risk management sectors.

name: ICT & Digital Economy
description: The DigiScale Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the ICT and digital economy sectors.

name: Professional Services
description: The ServicePro Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the professional and business services sectors.

name: Wholesale & Retail
description: The TradeConnect Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the wholesale and retail sectors.

name: Transport & Logistics
description: The MoveNation Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the transport and logistics sectors.

name: Public Sector Support
description: The GovSupport Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses serving the public sector and government.

name: Local Government Services
description: The Local Impact Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses within municipalities and local government services.

name: Security Services
description: The SecureForce Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the security and safety sectors.

name: Education & Training
description: The EduImpact Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the education and skills development sectors.

name: Health & Social Development
description: The CareImpact Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the healthcare and social development sectors.

name: Arts / Tourism / Hospitality
description: The CultureConnect Program supports entrepreneurs and businesses in the arts, culture, tourism and hospitality sectors.
